title: Festuca dertonensis
taxonomy: Festuca dertonensis is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Festuca, which comprises various species of fescue grasses. The Poaceae family, also known as the grass family, includes more than 12,000 species. The classification of Festuca dertonensis is further divided into the subfamily Pooideae, which is a group of cool-season grasses. The exact classification of this plant can be found in the APG III classification system.
